overview.title: What Is 4K Video YouTube MP4 Downloader?
overview.description: 4K Video is a free online tool designed specifically to help users download YouTube videos as MP4 for offline viewing. Unlike audio converters, the MP4 format keeps both video and sound, making it ideal for tutorials, presentations, music videos, and long-form YouTube content. You can return to the 4K Video homepage to access all YouTube download tools.

sections.title: YouTube Videos (MP4)
sections.description: Download YouTube videos as MP4 to keep the full visual experience. This option is ideal for tutorials, vlogs, music videos, and educational content that relies on video visuals.

sections.title: HD & 4K YouTube Videos
sections.description: When supported by the original video, 4K Video lets you download YouTube MP4 videos in HD and 4K quality for crystal-clear playback on large screens.

sections.title: Long YouTube Videos
sections.description: 4K Video supports downloading long YouTube videos as MP4 without duration limits, making it suitable for podcasts, documentaries, and full courses.

whyDownload.title: Why Download YouTube Videos as MP4?
whyDownload.description: MP4 is the most widely supported video format across devices and platforms. By choosing MP4, you can watch downloaded YouTube videos offline without compatibility issues. This format is perfect for users who want to save full videos instead of just audio.

qualityOptions.title: MP4 Video Quality & Long Video Support
qualityOptions.description: 4K Video allows you to download YouTube MP4 videos in multiple resolutions, including HD and 4K quality when available. The tool also supports long YouTube videos, such as full-length tutorials, lectures, and extended content, without time limits or restrictions.

items.question: What is the difference between YouTube MP4 and MP3?
items.answer: MP4 includes both video and audio, while MP3 only extracts sound. MP4 is better for offline viewing and visual content.

items.question: Can I download YouTube MP4 videos online?
items.answer: Yes. 4K Video works entirely online, allowing you to download YouTube MP4 videos directly in your browser.

items.question: Does 4K Video support HD and 4K MP4 downloads?
items.answer: Yes. 4K Video supports HD and 4K MP4 downloads when the original YouTube video is available in those resolutions.

items.question: Can I download long YouTube videos as MP4?
items.answer: Yes. 4K Video supports downloading long YouTube videos without time limits.

items.question: Is 4K Video free to use?
items.answer: Yes. 4K Video is completely free and does not require registration.

items.question: Can I use 4K Video on mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes. 4K Video works on both desktop and mobile browsers, including Android and iOS.
